items.title: Analysts Estimate Amgen (AMGN) to Report a Decline in Earnings: What to Look Out for
items.description: Amgen (AMGN) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

items.title: Roche Obesity Shot Helps Patients Lose Weight in Midstage Trial
items.description: Roche  Holding said an experimental injection achieved positive results in a midstage clinical trial by helping patients shed weight, paving the way for the start of the company’s first late-stage obesity study.  Eli Lilly  and  Novo Nordisk’s  GLP-1 drugs currently dominate the obesity-drug market, but big drugmakers including Roche, Pfizer and Amgen, as well as smaller players, are trying to come up with new treatments to challenge them.  Roche is looking to establish an obesity franchise with several drug candidates under development that it aims to launch as standalone treatments or combined among them, with the goal of becoming a top three player in the market.

items.title: Atopic Dermatitis Market to Reach USD 12.97 Billion by 2034, Growing at 7.75% CAGR
items.author: Towards Healthcare
items.description: The global atopic dermatitis market is valued at $7.13 billion in 2026 and is expected to grow to $12.97 billion by 2034 at a 7.75% CAGR. North America dominates the market, while biologics and JAK inhibitors are driving rapid expansion. Key developments include new drug approvals and strategic partnerships among major pharmaceutical companies.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Key market player in the growing atopic dermatitis sector with access to expanding biologics and advanced therapy segments.
